title: Turnip Tadka Crunch
description: A nutty, flaky, energizing Norwegian dish featuring turnips in a tadka seasoning blend that is jain-friendly and suitable for breakfast.

ingredients.name: Tadka Seasoning
ingredients.amount: 1 tablespoon (can be adjusted based on preference)

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.amount: as needed, to cover turnips during simmering

instructions: Heat coconut oil or ghee in a pan over medium heat.
Add cumin seeds and let them sizzle for about 30 seconds, until they turn golden brown.
Add turmeric powder and coriander powder to the hot spices and mix well.
Stir in thinly sliced turnips into the spice mixture. Add enough water to cover the turnips completely.
Reduce heat to low and let simmer for about 10 minutes, until the turnips are tender but not mushy.
Turn off the heat and serve hot with a side of yogurt or raita.
